title.en: Prompt Basics: Talking to AI Models Effectively
title.ta: பிராம்ப் அடிப்படைகள்: AI மாதிரிகளுடன் திறம்பட பேசுவது
title.te: ప్రాంప్ట్ బేసిక్స్ః AI మోడళ్లతో సమర్థవంతంగా మాట్లాడటం
title.ml: പ്രിംപ്റ്റ് ബേസിക്സ്: AI മോഡലുകളുമായി ഫലപ്രദമായി സംസാരിക്കുക
title.fr: Principaux éléments de base: parler efficacement aux modèles d'IA
title.es: Principios básicos: hablar con modelos de IA de manera efectiva
title.it: Principi di base: parlare efficacemente con i modelli di IA

description.en: Learn core prompting techniques — zero-shot, role assignment, and structured instructions — to get better AI outputs.

story_variants.en:
## Prompt Engineering: The Art of AI Communication

A **prompt** is the text you send to a language model. Prompt engineering is the skill of crafting prompts that reliably produce high-quality, relevant outputs.

### Why Prompting Matters

The same model can give wildly different outputs depending on how you ask:

```
Bad prompt:  "Tell me about sorting"

Good prompt: "Explain Python's sort() method to a beginner.
              Include: what it does, syntax, and one code example.
              Use simple language, no jargon."
```

### Core Techniques

| Technique | Description | Example |
|-----------|-------------|----------|
| **Zero-shot** | Ask directly, no examples | "Translate to French: Hello" |
| **Role assignment** | Tell the model who to be | "You are a Python expert..." |
| **Structured output** | Ask for specific format | "Reply in JSON with keys: name, age" |
| **Task decomposition** | Break into steps | "First do X, then do Y, then do Z" |
| **Constraint setting** | Limit the response | "In under 100 words..." |

### The Anatomy of a Good Prompt

```
[ROLE]        You are a senior data scientist.
[CONTEXT]     I have a CSV with 10,000 rows and 20 columns.
[TASK]        Suggest 5 data cleaning steps I should take first.
[FORMAT]      Reply as a numbered list.
[CONSTRAINTS] Be specific to Python/pandas.
```

### Zero-Shot Prompting

Zero-shot means providing no examples — just a clear instruction:

```python
prompt = """
Classify the following customer review as Positive, Negative, or Neutral.
Review: "The product arrived on time but the packaging was damaged."
Label:
"""
```

> **Key Insight:** Specificity is the single most important factor in prompt quality. Vague prompts produce vague responses. The more clearly you define the task, format, audience, and constraints, the more reliably the model delivers what you need.
story_variants.ta:
## ப்ராம்ப்ட் இன்ஜினியரிங்: AI தொடர்பு கலை

**ப்ராம்ப்ட்** என்பது நீங்கள் ஒரு மொழி மாதிரிக்கு அனுப்பும் உரையாகும். ப்ராம்ப்ட் இன்ஜினியரிங் என்பது, உயர்தரமான, தொடர்புடைய வெளியீடுகளை உறுதியாகத் தரும் ப்ராம்ப்ட்களை உருவாக்குவதற்கான திறமையாகும்.

### ப்ராம்ப்டிங் முக்கியத்துவம் ஏன்

அதே மாதிரி, நீங்கள் எப்படி கேட்கிறீர்கள் என்பதைப் பொறுத்து, வெவ்வேறு வகையான வெளியீடுகளைக் கொடுக்கலாம்:```
Bad prompt:  "Tell me about sorting"

Good prompt: "Explain Python's sort() method to a beginner.
              Include: what it does, syntax, and one code example.
              Use simple language, no jargon."
```### முக்கிய தொழில்நுட்பங்கள்

| தொழில்நுட்பம் | விளக்கம் | எடுத்துக்காட்டு |
|-----------|-------------|----------|
| **Zero-shot** | நேரடியாக கேட்க, எந்த எடுத்துக்காட்டுகளும் இல்லை | "Translate to French: Hello" |
| **Role assignment** | மாதிரியை யாராக இருக்க வேண்டும் என்று சொல்லுங்கள் | "You are a Python expert..." |
| **Structured output** | குறிப்பிட்ட வடிவமைப்பை கோருங்கள் | "Reply in JSON with keys: name, age" |
| **Task decomposition** | படிகளாக பிரிக்கவும் | "First do X, then do Y, then do Z" |
| **Constraint setting** | பதிலை கட்டுப்படுத்தவும் | "In under 100 words..." |

### ஒரு நல்ல பிராம்ப் (Prompt) இன் அமைப்பு```
[ROLE]        You are a senior data scientist.
[CONTEXT]     I have a CSV with 10,000 rows and 20 columns.
[TASK]        Suggest 5 data cleaning steps I should take first.
[FORMAT]      Reply as a numbered list.
[CONSTRAINTS] Be specific to Python/pandas.
```### சுய-உதாரண வழிமுறைகள் (Zero-Shot Prompting)

சுய-உதாரணம் (Zero-shot) என்பது எந்த எடுத்துக்காட்டுகளையும் வழங்காமல் — வெறும் தெளிவான ஒரு கட்டளையை மட்டும் வழங்குவதைக் குறிக்கும்:```python
prompt = """
Classify the following customer review as Positive, Negative, or Neutral.
Review: "The product arrived on time but the packaging was damaged."
Label:
"""
```> **முக்கிய உணர்வு:** தெளிவான விளக்கம் தூண்டுரையின் தரத்தில் ஒரே ஒரு மிகவும் முக்கிய காரணி. தெளிவற்ற தூண்டுரைகள் தெளிவற்ற பதில்களை உருவாக்குகின்றன. பணியை, வடிவமைப்பை, பார்வையாளரை, மற்றும் கட்டுப்பாடுகளை எவ்வளவு தெளிவாக வரையறுக்கிறீர்களோ, அவ்வளவு நம்பகமாக மாடல் உங்களுக்குத் தேவையானதை வழங்குகிறது.
story_variants.te:
## ప్రాంప్ట్ ఇంజనీరింగ్ః AI కమ్యూనికేషన్ యొక్క కళ

ఒక ** ప్రాంప్ట్** అనేది మీరు భాషా నమూనాకు పంపే టెక్స్ట్. ప్రాంప్ట్ ఇంజనీరింగ్ అనేది అధిక నాణ్యత గల, సంబంధిత అవుట్పుట్లను విశ్వసనీయంగా ఉత్పత్తి చేసే ప్రాంప్ట్లను రూపొందించే నైపుణ్యం.

### ఎందుకు ప్రాముఖ్యత

అదే నమూనా మీరు ఎలా అడగండి ఆధారపడి చాలా భిన్నంగా అవుట్పుట్ ఇవ్వవచ్చుః

```
Bad prompt:  "Tell me about sorting"

Good prompt: "Explain Python's sort() method to a beginner.
              Include: what it does, syntax, and one code example.
              Use simple language, no jargon."
```

### ప్రధాన పద్ధతులు

 సాంకేతికత  వివరణ  ఉదాహరణ 
|-----------|-------------|----------|
 "ఫ్రెంచ్కి అనువదించండిః హలో" 
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
 "మొదటి X, తరువాత Y, తరువాత Z" 
 "100 పదాల కన్నా తక్కువ లోపు. . . " 

### మంచి ప్రేరణ యొక్క అవయవాలు

```
[ROLE]        You are a senior data scientist.
[CONTEXT]     I have a CSV with 10,000 rows and 20 columns.
[TASK]        Suggest 5 data cleaning steps I should take first.
[FORMAT]      Reply as a numbered list.
[CONSTRAINTS] Be specific to Python/pandas.
```

### సున్నా షాట్ ప్రోప్టింగ్

సున్నా షాట్ అంటే ఉదాహరణలు ఇవ్వడం లేదు  కేవలం స్పష్టమైన సూచనః

```python
prompt = """
Classify the following customer review as Positive, Negative, or Neutral.
Review: "The product arrived on time but the packaging was damaged."
Label:
"""
```

> ** కీ ఇన్సైట్ః** ప్రాంప్ట్ నాణ్యతలో ప్రత్యేకత అతి ముఖ్యమైన అంశం. అస్పష్టమైన ప్రాంప్ట్లు అస్పష్టమైన ప్రతిస్పందనలను ఉత్పత్తి చేస్తాయి. మీరు పని, ఆకృతి, ప్రేక్షకులు మరియు పరిమితులను స్పష్టంగా నిర్వచించినప్పుడు, మోడల్ మీకు అవసరమైన వాటిని మరింత విశ్వసనీయంగా అందిస్తుంది.
story_variants.ml:
## പ്രംപ്റ്റ് എഞ്ചിനീയറിംഗ്ഃ ഐ. ഐ. ആശയവിനിമയത്തിന്റെ കല

ഒരു **പ്രംപ്റ്റ്** എന്നത് ഒരു ഭാഷാ മോഡലിലേക്ക് നിങ്ങൾ അയയ്ക്കുന്ന ടെക്സ്റ്റാണ്. ഉയർന്ന നിലവാരമുള്ള പ്രസക്തമായ ഔട്ട്പുട്ടുകൾ വിശ്വസനീയമായി ഉത്പാദിപ്പിക്കുന്ന പ്രോംപ്റ്റുകൾ സൃഷ്ടിക്കുന്നതിനുള്ള കഴിവാണ് പ്രോംപ്റ്റ് എഞ്ചിനീയറിംഗ്.

### എന്തുകൊണ്ടാണ് വേഗം വരേണ്ടത്

ഒരേ മോഡലിന് എങ്ങനെ ചോദിക്കാമെന്നതിനെ ആശ്രയിച്ച് തികച്ചും വ്യത്യസ്തമായ ഫലങ്ങൾ നൽകാം.

```
Bad prompt:  "Tell me about sorting"

Good prompt: "Explain Python's sort() method to a beginner.
              Include: what it does, syntax, and one code example.
              Use simple language, no jargon."
```

### അടിസ്ഥാന സാങ്കേതിക വിദ്യകൾ

∙ ടെക്നിക്കല് ∙ വിവരണം ∙ ഉദാഹരണം ∙
|-----------|-------------|----------|
∙∙∙സെറോ ഷോട്ട് ∙∙∙ നേരിട്ട് ചോദിക്കുക, ഉദാഹരണങ്ങളില്ല ∙∙
∙∙∙ "നിങ്ങള് പൈത്തോൺ വിദഗ്ധരാണ്. . . "
∙∙∙ഒരു പ്രത്യേക ഫോർമാറ്റ് ചോദിക്കുക ∙ "JSON ൽ കീകൾ ഉപയോഗിച്ച് മറുപടി നൽകുകഃ പേര്, പ്രായം"
∙∙∙ "ആദ്യം X ചെയ്യുക, പിന്നെ Y ചെയ്യുക, പിന്നെ Z ചെയ്യുക"
∙∙∙കമ്മിഷൻ ക്രമീകരണം ∙∙∙∙∙∙ "100 വാക്കിൽ താഴെ"

### നല്ല ഒരു ഉദ്യമത്തിന്റെ അനാട്ടമി

```
[ROLE]        You are a senior data scientist.
[CONTEXT]     I have a CSV with 10,000 rows and 20 columns.
[TASK]        Suggest 5 data cleaning steps I should take first.
[FORMAT]      Reply as a numbered list.
[CONSTRAINTS] Be specific to Python/pandas.
```

### പൂജ്യം ഷോട്ട് പ്രോംപ്റ്റിംഗ്

പൂജ്യം ഷോട്ട് എന്നതിനർത്ഥം ഉദാഹരണങ്ങളില്ലാതെ നൽകുക എന്നാണെ  വ്യക്തമായ നിർദ്ദേശം മാത്രം നൽകുക എന്നാണെ ∙

```python
prompt = """
Classify the following customer review as Positive, Negative, or Neutral.
Review: "The product arrived on time but the packaging was damaged."
Label:
"""
```

> ** കീ ഇൻസൈറ്റ്ഃ** പ്രാപ്തതയുടെ ഗുണനിലവാരത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും പ്രധാനപ്പെട്ട ഘടകമാണ് പ്രത്യേകത. അജ്ഞാതമായ നിർദ്ദേശങ്ങൾ അജ്ഞാതമായ പ്രതികരണങ്ങൾ സൃഷ്ടിക്കുന്നു. നിങ്ങൾ ചുമതല, ഫോർമാറ്റ്, പ്രേക്ഷകരെ, നിയന്ത്രണങ്ങൾ എന്നിവ വ്യക്തമായി നിർവചിച്ചതനുസരിച്ച്, മോഡൽ നിങ്ങൾക്ക് ആവശ്യമുള്ളത് കൂടുതൽ വിശ്വസനീയമായി നൽകുന്നു.
story_variants.fr:
## L'ingénierie rapide: l'art de la communication par l'IA

Une "improvisation" est le texte que vous envoyez à un modèle de langage.

### Pourquoi il est important de se précipiter

Le même modèle peut donner des résultats très différents selon la façon dont vous demandez:

```
Bad prompt:  "Tell me about sorting"

Good prompt: "Explain Python's sort() method to a beginner.
              Include: what it does, syntax, and one code example.
              Use simple language, no jargon."
```

### Techniques de base

Je suis un homme qui a des problèmes de santé.
|-----------|-------------|----------|
Je suis un homme qui a une bonne idée de ce que je fais.
Je suis un spécialiste de Python.
Je vous demande un format spécifique. "Répondre en JSON avec des clés: nom, âge".
Je vais vous dire: "D'abord faire X, puis faire Y, puis faire Z".
Je suis un homme qui a une bonne idée de ce que je fais.

### L'anatomie d'une bonne impulsion

```
[ROLE]        You are a senior data scientist.
[CONTEXT]     I have a CSV with 10,000 rows and 20 columns.
[TASK]        Suggest 5 data cleaning steps I should take first.
[FORMAT]      Reply as a numbered list.
[CONSTRAINTS] Be specific to Python/pandas.
```

### Précipitation à tir zéro

Le "zero shot" signifie ne pas fournir d'exemples  seulement une instruction claire:

```python
prompt = """
Classify the following customer review as Positive, Negative, or Neutral.
Review: "The product arrived on time but the packaging was damaged."
Label:
"""
```

> ** Key Insight:** La spécificité est le facteur le plus important dans la qualité de la prompt. Les demandes vagues produisent des réponses vagues. Plus vous définissez clairement la tâche, le format, le public et les contraintes, plus le modèle fournit de manière fiable ce dont vous avez besoin.
story_variants.es:
## Ingeniería rápida: el arte de la comunicación de IA

Una **prompt** es el texto que envías a un modelo de lenguaje.

### Por qué es importante ser urgente

El mismo modelo puede dar resultados muy diferentes dependiendo de cómo se pregunta:

```
Bad prompt:  "Tell me about sorting"

Good prompt: "Explain Python's sort() method to a beginner.
              Include: what it does, syntax, and one code example.
              Use simple language, no jargon."
```

### Técnicas básicas

 Técnica  Descripción  Ejemplo 
|-----------|-------------|----------|
# # No hay ejemplos # # "Traducir al francés: Hola" #
♪ Dime a la modelo quién sea ♪ "Eres un experto en Python... "
# # Requéreme un formato específico # # "Respondas en JSON con claves: nombre, edad" #
# #Trabajar con la descomposición # #Parte en pasos # #Primero hacer X, luego hacer Y, luego hacer Z #
♪ Con restricciones de configuración ♪ ♪ Limita la respuesta ♪ "En menos de 100 palabras... " ♪

### La anatomía de una buena señal

```
[ROLE]        You are a senior data scientist.
[CONTEXT]     I have a CSV with 10,000 rows and 20 columns.
[TASK]        Suggest 5 data cleaning steps I should take first.
[FORMAT]      Reply as a numbered list.
[CONSTRAINTS] Be specific to Python/pandas.
```

### El tiro cero

El tiro cero significa no proporcionar ejemplos  sólo una instrucción clara:

```python
prompt = """
Classify the following customer review as Positive, Negative, or Neutral.
Review: "The product arrived on time but the packaging was damaged."
Label:
"""
```

> ** Key Insight:** La especificidad es el factor más importante en la calidad de la respuesta rápida. Las instrucciones vagas producen respuestas vagas. Cuanto más claramente defines la tarea, el formato, la audiencia y las restricciones, más confiablemente el modelo entrega lo que necesitas.
story_variants.it:
## Ingegneria rapida: l'arte della comunicazione AI

Un **prompt** è il testo che si invia a un modello linguistico.

### Perché è importante essere urgenti

Lo stesso modello può dare risultati molto diversi a seconda di come chiedi:

```
Bad prompt:  "Tell me about sorting"

Good prompt: "Explain Python's sort() method to a beginner.
              Include: what it does, syntax, and one code example.
              Use simple language, no jargon."
```

### Tecnologie fondamentali

 Tecnica  Descrizione  Esempio 
|-----------|-------------|----------|
# # Chiedi direttamente, nessun esempio # # "Tradurre in francese: Ciao" #
# # Di' alla modella # # Chi è che deve essere # # "Sei un esperto di Python... #
# # Rispondi in JSON con chiavi: nome, età # # #
# # Facciamo prima X, poi Y, poi Z # # # # Fate Z # # # Fate X # # Fate X # # Fate X # # Fate X # # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate X # Fate
# # Constring Settings # # Limita la risposta # # "In meno di 100 parole... " #

### L'anatomia di un buon impulso

```
[ROLE]        You are a senior data scientist.
[CONTEXT]     I have a CSV with 10,000 rows and 20 columns.
[TASK]        Suggest 5 data cleaning steps I should take first.
[FORMAT]      Reply as a numbered list.
[CONSTRAINTS] Be specific to Python/pandas.
```

### Pronto tiro zero

Zero-shot significa non fornire esempi  solo una chiara istruzione:

```python
prompt = """
Classify the following customer review as Positive, Negative, or Neutral.
Review: "The product arrived on time but the packaging was damaged."
Label:
"""
```

> ** Key Insight:** La specificità è il fattore più importante nella qualità del prompt. Le richieste vaghe producono risposte vaghe. Più chiaramente definisci il compito, il formato, il pubblico e i vincoli, più confiabilmente il modello fornisce ciò di cui hai bisogno.
story_variants.ko:
## 인프트 엔지니어링: 인공지능 커뮤니케이션의 예술

**프롬프트는 언어 모델에 보내는 텍스트입니다. 프롬프트 엔지니어링은 고품질의 관련 출력을 안정적으로 생성하는 프롬프트를 만드는 기술입니다.

### 왜 급속히 해야 하는 일 이 중요 합니까?

같은 모델은 어떻게 물어볼지에 따라 매우 다른 결과를 줄 수 있습니다.

```
Bad prompt:  "Tell me about sorting"

Good prompt: "Explain Python's sort() method to a beginner.
              Include: what it does, syntax, and one code example.
              Use simple language, no jargon."
```

### 핵심 기술

 기술  설명  예제
|-----------|-------------|----------|
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
♪ 롤 어뢰를 해줘 ♪ ♪ 모델에게 누가 될지 말해 ♪ "당신은 파이썬 전문가야... "
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              
                      
♪ 제한 설정 ♪ ♪ 응답을 제한 ♪ "100 단어 이하로... "

### 좋은 인파의 해부

```
[ROLE]        You are a senior data scientist.
[CONTEXT]     I have a CSV with 10,000 rows and 20 columns.
[TASK]        Suggest 5 data cleaning steps I should take first.
[FORMAT]      Reply as a numbered list.
[CONSTRAINTS] Be specific to Python/pandas.
```

### 무사냥 발사

         

```python
prompt = """
Classify the following customer review as Positive, Negative, or Neutral.
Review: "The product arrived on time but the packaging was damaged."
Label:
"""
```

> **키 인사이트:** 구체적인 것은 신속한 품질의 가장 중요한 요소입니다. 모호한 요청은 모호한 반응을 낳습니다. 작업, 형식, 청중 및 제약을 더 명확하게 정의하면 모델이 더 안정적으로 필요한 것을 제공합니다.

steps.line: role = 'You are a senior Python developer.'

explanation.en: Role assignment primes the model to respond with domain expertise

steps.line: task = 'Review the following code and list 3 improvements.'
format_instr = 'Format as a numbered list. Be concise.'

explanation.en: Format instructions control the structure of the response
Combine all parts into one well-structured prompt

right.label: Structured prompt
right.code: "You are a Python tutor.\nExplain list comprehensions\nto a beginner in 3 bullet points."

animation_sequence.code:
# Prompt Engineering Basics
prompt_v1 = "Tell me about Python"
# Too vague — LLM might talk about snakes!

prompt_v2 = """You are a Python tutor.
Explain list comprehensions in 3 bullet points
with one code example for a beginner."""
# Specific role + format + audience

prompt_v3 = """Context: Student knows loops but not comprehensions.
Task: Explain list comprehensions.
Format: 3 bullets + 1 code example.
Tone: Friendly, encouraging."""

executionSteps.explanation: Bad prompt: too vague, no constraints
Better: assigns role, specifies format and audience
Best: structured with context, task, format, and tone
More structure = more predictable, higher quality output

instruction.en: Write a well-structured prompt string called `explain_prompt` that asks an AI to explain recursion to a high school student. Include a role, the task, a format instruction (use an analogy), and a constraint (under 150 words).
instruction.ta: `explain_prompt` என்ற சிறப்பான வடிவமைப்பு சரத்தை உருவாக்கவும், இது ஒரு உயர்நிலைப் பள்ளி மாணவருக்கு மீளடைவு (recursion) குறித்து விளக்க ஒரு AI ஐ கேட்கும். இதில் ஒரு பங்கு (role), ஒரு பணி (task), ஒரு வடிவமைப்பு வழிமுறை (format instruction - ஒரு ஒப்பீட்டு உதாரணம் பயன்படுத்தவும்), மற்றும் ஒரு கட்டுப்பாடு (constraint - 150 சொற்களுக்குள்) அடங்கியிருக்க வேண்டும்.
instruction.te: `explain_prompt` అని పిలువబడే బాగా నిర్మాణాత్మక ప్రాంప్ట్ స్ట్రింగ్ను వ్రాయండి. ఇది ఒక AI ను ఉన్నత పాఠశాల విద్యార్థికి పునరావృతాలను వివరించమని అడుగుతుంది. పాత్ర, పని, ఫార్మాట్ సూచన (అనలాజీని ఉపయోగించండి) మరియు పరిమితిని (150 పదాల కంటే తక్కువ) చేర్చండి.
instruction.ml: `explain_prompt` എന്ന പേരിൽ ഒരു നന്നായി ഘടനാപരമായ പ്രോംപ്റ്റ് സ്ട്രിംഗ് എഴുതുക. ഒരു ഹൈസ്കൂൾ വിദ്യാർത്ഥിക്ക് ഒരു റിക്യുഷൻ വിശദീകരിക്കാൻ ഒരു AI- നെ ആവശ്യപ്പെടുന്നു. ഒരു റോൾ, ടാസ്ക്, ഫോർമാറ്റ് നിർദ്ദേശം (ഒരു അനലോഗി ഉപയോഗിക്കുക), ഒരു നിയന്ത്രണം (150 വാക്കിൽ താഴെ) എന്നിവ ഉൾപ്പെടുത്തുക.
instruction.fr: Écrivez une chaîne de prompt bien structurée appelée `explain_prompt` qui demande à une IA d'expliquer la récursion à un élève du secondaire.
instruction.es: Escriba una cadena de respuesta bien estructurada llamada `explain_prompt` que pida a una IA que explique la recursión a un estudiante de secundaria. Incluya un papel, la tarea, una instrucción de formato (use una analogía) y una restricción (menos de 150 palabras).
instruction.it: Scrivere una stringa di richieste ben strutturata chiamata `explain_prompt` che chiede ad un AI di spiegare la ricorsione a uno studente di scuola superiore. Include un ruolo, il compito, un'istruzione di formato (utilizza un'analogia) e un vincolo (meno di 150 parole).
instruction.ko: `explain_prompt`라는 잘 구조화된 프롬프트 문자열을 작성하여 AI가 고등학교 학생에게 재귀를 설명하도록 요청합니다. 역할, 작업, 형식 명령 (분대법을 사용) 및 제한 (150 단어 이하) 를 포함하십시오.

hints.en: Start with: 'You are an experienced Python teacher.'
Add a format instruction: 'Use a real-world analogy.'

practice_challenges.test_code:
assert isinstance(explain_prompt, str), 'explain_prompt must be a string'
assert len(explain_prompt) > 50, 'prompt should be detailed enough (> 50 chars)'
assert 'recursion' in explain_prompt.lower(), 'prompt must mention recursion'
assert any(word in explain_prompt.lower() for word in ['student', 'beginner', 'simple', 'analogy', 'words']), 'prompt should guide the audience or format'

instruction.en: Write a zero-shot classification prompt string called `classify_prompt` that asks an AI to classify a movie review as 'Positive', 'Negative', or 'Neutral'. The review to classify is: 'The visuals were stunning but the plot was predictable.'  Include the expected format explicitly.

hints.en: End your prompt with 'Label:' to guide the model toward a single-word answer
Specify: 'Reply with only one word: Positive, Negative, or Neutral.'

practice_challenges.test_code:
assert isinstance(classify_prompt, str), 'classify_prompt must be a string'
assert 'positive' in classify_prompt.lower() or 'negative' in classify_prompt.lower(), 'prompt must include label options'
assert 'stunning' in classify_prompt.lower() or 'predictable' in classify_prompt.lower() or 'visuals' in classify_prompt.lower(), 'prompt must include the review text'
